name: After Effects MCP Server
description: 10-tool MCP server for After Effects automation

tools.name: modify_property
tools.description: Modify layer property (position, opacity, scale, rotation)

tools.name: apply_expression
tools.description: Apply JavaScript expression to layer property

tools.name: set_keyframe
tools.description: Set keyframe on layer property at specific time

tools.name: create_null_and_parent
tools.description: Create null layer and parent target layer to it

tools.name: render_comp
tools.description: Add composition to render queue with H.264 output

tools.name: execute_arbitrary_jsx
tools.description: Execute arbitrary ExtendScript code (dangerous operations blocked)
